rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAYMOND MATTHEWS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Procedural issues remaining: 1) The underlying petition has not been updated to correct the value of the estate's partial interest in the real property. 2) Please provide authority for the request to waive statutory fees in this estate on the condition that they are collected in the related estate. Is petitioner and counsel for petitioner seeking approval in this estate to collect in the related estate if and when the property is sold? Please clarify the request. 3) The response to examiner's notes alludes to an updated proposed order having been lodged, but no such document has been lodged with the court. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EMMETT T. HEGARTY REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST, DATED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Irrevocable Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Othereof
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1. Court to determine whether the proposed changes are necessary to clear up ambiguities / incomplete directions. 2. The proposed modification does not provide for Dana's issue, as in the original trust, only to her present daughter. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EMMETT T. HEGARTY REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST, DATED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property [Cal. Prob. C. 17200.1 And 850(A)(3)(B)]
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: The trust does not identify any of the subject assets, and a general assignment of interest does not exist. In addition: One of the subject financial accounts was held in joint tenancy. Many of the accounts were operating accounts held by a property management company. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
